hook: Breathwork is more than relaxation; it can directly change your physiology.

script.hook: Breathwork is more than relaxation; it can directly change your physiology.
beats: Breathing is the only autonomic function you can control, giving you direct access to your nervous system.
Research shows that techniques like cyclic sighing can significantly reduce anxiety and improve mood.
However, while breathwork is powerful, it won't solve underlying stressors in your life.
script.close: Follow BestKarma for science-backed health without the hype.

visualPlan: Visual of someone practicing breathwork in a calm setting.
